interventions.pattern: High frustration + low stage + churn risk (23 agents)
interventions.root_cause: Chatbot support p_fail=0.38 generates frustration faster than 0.90/wk decay. support_drag=0.08, adoption_friction=0.15. Traced to: L1 support_dependency × L3 Poisson λ × p_fail.
interventions.intervention: Improve chatbot KB for common ticket types (VPN, hardware). Target: reduce p_fail from 38% to 20%.

interventions.pattern: High frustration + low stage + churn risk (13 agents)
interventions.root_cause: Hybrid support p_fail=0.22 generates frustration faster than 0.90/wk decay. support_drag=0.03, adoption_friction=0.06. Traced to: L1 support_dependency × L3 Poisson λ × p_fail.
interventions.intervention: Hybrid support p_fail=22% is moderate. Consider adding dedicated Tier-1 human support for Cluster 3 agents to reduce unresolved ticket frustration.
